=== Quick Fix Inventory ===

[D1] (5:31-5:41) TS377022: The `catch` callback in `Effect.try` returns the global `Error` type. Untagged errors merge together in the Effect error channel and lose type-level distinction; a tagged error preserves that distinction and can wrap the original error in a `cause` property. effect(globalErrorInEffectCatch)
  Fix 0: "Disable globalErrorInEffectCatch for this line"
  Fix 1: "Disable globalErrorInEffectCatch for entire file"

[D2] (6:14-6:47) TS377026: This code uses `JSON.parse` or `JSON.stringify`. Use `Schema.UnknownFromJsonString` for unknown shapes, `Schema.fromJsonString(schema)` for known ones, or `Schema.toCodecJson(schema)` when working with JSON values instead of strings. effect(preferSchemaOverJson)
  Fix 0: "Disable preferSchemaOverJson for this line"
  Fix 1: "Disable preferSchemaOverJson for entire file"

[D3] (7:16-7:44) TS377023: Global 'Error' loses type safety as untagged errors merge together in the Effect failure channel. Consider using a tagged error and optionally wrapping the original in a 'cause' property. effect(globalErrorInEffectFailure)
  Fix 0: "Disable globalErrorInEffectFailure for this line"
  Fix 1: "Disable globalErrorInEffectFailure for entire file"

[D4] (11:35-11:45) TS377022: The `catch` callback in `Effect.try` returns the global `Error` type. Untagged errors merge together in the Effect error channel and lose type-level distinction; a tagged error preserves that distinction and can wrap the original error in a `cause` property. effect(globalErrorInEffectCatch)
  Fix 0: "Disable globalErrorInEffectCatch for this line"
  Fix 1: "Disable globalErrorInEffectCatch for entire file"

[D5] (12:14-12:47) TS377026: This code uses `JSON.parse` or `JSON.stringify`. Use `Schema.UnknownFromJsonString` for unknown shapes, `Schema.fromJsonString(schema)` for known ones, or `Schema.toCodecJson(schema)` when working with JSON values instead of strings. effect(preferSchemaOverJson)
  Fix 0: "Disable preferSchemaOverJson for this line"
  Fix 1: "Disable preferSchemaOverJson for entire file"

[D6] (13:16-13:48) TS377023: Global 'Error' loses type safety as untagged errors merge together in the Effect failure channel. Consider using a tagged error and optionally wrapping the original in a 'cause' property. effect(globalErrorInEffectFailure)
  Fix 0: "Disable globalErrorInEffectFailure for this line"
  Fix 1: "Disable globalErrorInEffectFailure for entire file"

[D7] (19:18-19:34) TS377026: This code uses `JSON.parse` or `JSON.stringify`. Use `Schema.UnknownFromJsonString` for unknown shapes, `Schema.fromJsonString(schema)` for known ones, or `Schema.toCodecJson(schema)` when working with JSON values instead of strings. effect(preferSchemaOverJson)
  Fix 0: "Disable preferSchemaOverJson for this line"
  Fix 1: "Disable preferSchemaOverJson for entire file"

[D8] (27:16-27:36) TS377026: This code uses `JSON.parse` or `JSON.stringify`. Use `Schema.UnknownFromJsonString` for unknown shapes, `Schema.fromJsonString(schema)` for known ones, or `Schema.toCodecJson(schema)` when working with JSON values instead of strings. effect(preferSchemaOverJson)
  Fix 0: "Disable preferSchemaOverJson for this line"
  Fix 1: "Disable preferSchemaOverJson for entire file"

[D9] (35:18-35:34) TS377026: This code uses `JSON.parse` or `JSON.stringify`. Use `Schema.UnknownFromJsonString` for unknown shapes, `Schema.fromJsonString(schema)` for known ones, or `Schema.toCodecJson(schema)` when working with JSON values instead of strings. effect(preferSchemaOverJson)
  Fix 0: "Disable preferSchemaOverJson for this line"

[D10] (41:7-41:20) TS6133: '_regularParse' is declared but its value is never read.
